release_notes: Build 200: Central Server Setup auto-detects known centrals; removed Manage central servers and Test SSH; renamed Initial Server Setup.

config_builder.release_notes: Build 6: Dual-server remote feed (blackfoxupdate.ir + foxnext.net) for version.json, wallet.json, news.json, and APK download.

vpn_android.release_notes: Build 20: GitHub updated to https://github.com/balckfoxgroup. Full 10-language support is available across all app editions and the website: English, Persian (Farsi), Russian, Chinese, German, Uzbek, Turkish, Indonesian, Ukrainian, Hindi.
